description.initial: The south-central ocean marks the furthest corner of the explored world. From here, every direction leads back toward civilization, toward home. The water is calm and deep, reflecting a sky that seems larger than anywhere else. This is where journeys end and new ones begin.
description.return: The south-central ocean. The world's corner, where all paths lead home.
description.atmospheric: Endings and beginnings share this space. Every journey must eventually turn toward home.

south.blockedMessage: The southern ocean extends forever. All paths now lead home.

east.blockedMessage: The eastern ocean stretches beyond all maps. Your path lies elsewhere.

interactables.name: World's Edge
interactables.examineText: This feels like the corner of the map, where explorers must turn back. There's nothing here but ocean and sky, and the knowledge that home waits in the other direction.
